# terrible_community_clickhouse_clickhouse_role (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Role name to add or remove.

### Optional

- `cluster` (String) Run the command on all cluster hosts. If the cluster is not configured, the command will crash with an error.
- `settings` (String) Settings with their limitations that apply to the role. You can also specify the profile from which the settings will be inherited.
- `state` (String) Role state. `present` creates the role if it does not exist. `absent` deletes the role if it exists.

### Read-Only

- `executed_statements` (String) Data-modifying executed statements.
